# Test Fixtures

Place sample files here for integration tests:

- `sample.pdf`  — 10+ page PDF with text, headings, and embedded images
- `sample.pptx` — 5+ slide deck with titles, body text, speaker notes, and images
- `sample.docx` — document with Heading 1/2/3 hierarchy, paragraphs, and embedded images

These are not committed to the repo. Generate or obtain them manually and place
them here before running integration tests in `test_ingestion/`.
